covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from Kentucky Department for Public Health
covid_surveillance.long_description: Kentucky Department for Public Health collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

influenza_surveillance.short_description: Weekly influenza surveillance data from Kentucky Department for Public Health
influenza_surveillance.long_description: Kentucky Department for Public Health collects and reports influenza surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

rsv_surveillance.short_description: Weekly rsv surveillance data from Kentucky Department for Public Health
rsv_surveillance.long_description: Kentucky Department for Public Health collects and reports rsv surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

ili_surveillance.short_description: Weekly ili surveillance data from Kentucky Department for Public Health
ili_surveillance.long_description: Kentucky Department for Public Health collects and reports ili surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

ky_dph.name: Kentucky Department for Public Health
ky_dph.description: Kentucky Department for Public Health provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for Kentucky covering pathogens including: covid, influenza, rsv, ili . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
ky_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
